posts.author: JHarrington (Jen H)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Have Automations management pop out to a new window so that it is easy to see the board and the automation you are trying to create or edit.

What are you trying to achieve

Easier to have a side-by-side view of the automations and the board.
